overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a neon-lit urban commercial district. The player walks along a sidewalk under an overpass, turns into a plaza with a vibrant pink and cyan circular outdoor bar, then returns to the street while vehicles pass by.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk under elevated highway overpass

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk toward a neon-lit commercial building in the distance

notable_agents.action: walking past the camera in the opposite direction

entered.detail: elevated highway or monorail track casting shadows over the sidewalk
tall gray concrete wall running parallel to the walkway
distinctive orange diamond-plate textured sidewalk panels
commercial building with red neon 'FOODSCAPE' signage visible in the distance
tall pole with bright horizontal LED light fixture

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a covered urban sidewalk beneath an elevated overpass. The camera moves forward along orange textured pavement beside a concrete retaining wall, approaching a distant building with red neon signage. Sparse pedestrian traffic moves in the opposite direction while the overpass structure dominates the upper frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: street corner with neon-lit commercial building entrance

events.description: turning left from the covered sidewalk into the open plaza area with the circular neon bar

agents.ego_description: navigating the street corner and turning left into the plaza while passing pedestrians

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking along the sidewalk near the building entrance

entered.detail: futuristic circular building structure with bright pink and cyan neon lighting
large floating digital billboard displaying animated content
low concrete blocks lining the edge of the plaza

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches the Foodscape building corner where the sidewalk opens up. Turning left reveals a vibrant plaza dominated by a circular structure with intense pink and cyan neon lighting. Pedestrians populate the corner area as the camera transitions from the enclosed overpass to the more open, brightly lit commercial space.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor plaza with circular neon bar and outdoor seating

events.description: walking past the outdoor seating area where NPCs are sitting at the neon-lit bar counter

agents.ego_description: walking through the plaza and observing the neon bar area with seated patrons

notable_agents.action: patrons sitting at the curved outdoor bar counter underneath the pink neon canopy

entered.detail: large rectangular concrete planters with greenery separating walkway areas
illuminated vertical display showing menu items and prices
tall vertical billboard displaying a beverage advertisement with '15% OFF' text

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through the vibrant plaza centered around the circular neon bar with its distinctive pink and cyan glow. NPCs sit at the outdoor counter beneath the illuminated canopy. The ground transitions to concrete plaza tiles as the camera passes digital menu boards and concrete planters, with holographic advertisements visible on surrounding buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: city street sidewalk under elevated highway

events.description: exiting the neon plaza back onto the main street sidewalk under the overpass

agents.ego_description: walking along the street sidewalk away from the plaza, following a pedestrian in red clothing

notable_agents.action: woman in red pants walking ahead on the sidewalk in the same direction

entered.detail: multi-lane road with vehicles passing by
dark colored car parked along the curb

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the plaza back onto the street sidewalk beneath the overpass structure. The orange textured pavement returns as the camera follows a pedestrian walking ahead. Vehicles move along the asphalt street to the right, and the environment returns to the more enclosed, dimly lit urban corridor with holographic billboards visible in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dimly lit urban corridor into a vibrant, neon-soaked plaza before returning to the enclosed street. It begins on a covered sidewalk beneath an elevated overpass, moving along orange textured pavement and a concrete wall toward distant red neon signage. As the camera reaches the corner of a building, the enclosed space opens up and turns left into a brightly lit plaza dominated by a circular bar glowing with intense pink and cyan light. The scene then expands through this commercial hub, passing digital menu boards and holographic advertisements while moving across concrete plaza tiles. Finally, the camera exits the plaza and transitions back onto the orange sidewalk beneath the overpass, following a pedestrian as vehicles pass by in the returning dimness of the urban corridor.
